name: F-0 lock contract: detector contract follows the §2.2 exit-code convention 0=clean 2=violation
command: printf 'x' > /tmp/f0-empty.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/refused-flags.sh" --in /tmp/f0-empty.txt 2>/dev/null; rc=$?; [ "$rc" = 0 ] || [ "$rc" = 2 ] && echo locked 1>&2; rm -f /tmp/f0-empty.txt
